channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [WFLA News Channel 8] Trump celebrates the World Cup as a US victory as he presents trophy to the winner, Spain
item.description: EAST RUTHERFORD, N.J. (AP) — President Donald Trump presented the World Cup trophy to Spain, the winner of Sunday’s final against Argentina. But to him, the real victor of soccer’s premier tournament just might be the United States. “It turned out we were a soccer country, and I think it’s going to remain,” Trump said [...]

item.title: [WFLA News Channel 8] High-profile Trump nominees pose test for outgoing Republicans
item.description: Several high-profile Trump administration nominees face committee votes in the coming weeks that will show whether outgoing GOP senators are willing to buck the administration — or at least exert some leverage. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) director nominee Erica Schwartz and attorney general nominee Todd Blanche received a tepid reception at their [...]

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Man accused of using stolen identity in Brandon to buy $20K in jewelry arrested
item.description: A man accused of using stolen personal information to purchase more than $20,000 in jewelry at stores in Brandon has been arrested in New York following a multi-state investigation.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] News Tonight - Top Headlines and Weather for July 19
item.description: Dozens rally demanding justice after ICE shootings, Spain defeats Argentina 1-0 to win 2026 World Cup, and lower rain chance next week.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Florida investigators track suspect to New York in $20,000 jewelry theft

[WFLA News Channel 8] JD and Usha Vance welcome a baby boy, the first child born to a sitting VP in more than 150 years
item.description: Vice President JD Vance and his wife, second lady Usha Vance, on Sunday announced the birth of their fourth child, the first born to a sitting vice president in more than 150 years.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] 85-year-old driver dies after truck crashes into retention pond in Pinellas County: FHP
item.description: An 85-year-old man died after losing control of his pickup truck and crashing into a retention pond in Pinellas County on Sunday afternoon.

[WFLA News Channel 8] Spain wins the World Cup by beating Argentina 1-0 on Ferran Torres' goal in extra time
item.description: Spain substitute Ferran Torres scored in the 106th minute to give his team a 1-0 win over defending champion Argentina in the World Cup final on Sunday.

item.title: [WFLA News Channel 8] Spain wins the World Cup by beating Argentina 1-0 on Ferran Torres' goal in extra time
item.description: EAST RUTHERFORD, N.J. (AP) — Spain substitute Ferran Torres scored in the 106th minute to give his team a 1-0 win over defending champion Argentina in the World Cup final on Sunday. Spain was absolutely dominant in terms of possession and shot attempts. Lionel Messi and Argentina found a way to hang on and force [...]

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Spain defeats Argentina 1-0 to win 2026 World Cup
item.description: Spain is your 2026 FIFA World Cup champions! 🏆 Ferran Torres scored in the 106th minute of extra time to defeat Argentina 1-0 and secure Spain's second World Cup title.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Longtime Sarasota diner closes after 36 years, citing rising operating costs
